standard: Ruskin MDRS25 / CDR94 (round manual balancing / control damper)
description: Round HVAC manual balancing (butterfly) damper in the closed position: a rolled sheet-metal frame spool, a circular blade filling the bore on a diametral through-shaft, and a shaft extension for the locking hand quadrant. Axle is round or square.
source: Ruskin MDRS25 (light quadrant) + CDR94 (heavy control) round-damper datasheets; frame depth / blade / shaft ranges from their published size tables
